body.docName: 医招智付供应商端配送明细导入
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/import 
 ## 接口描述 
药品配送明细导入，将集采平台业务系统中的药品配送明细数据推送至医招智付（供应商端）应用。

以药品配送明细编码作为唯一键，重复导入时进行更新操作。

注意：
1. 批量接口，允许部分成功；
2. 单次导入上限为1000；
3. 已从供应商端推送至医院端的数据，不支持更新。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospitalXftCode","required":true,"exampleValue":"%22XFT00001%22","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"100","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E7%9A%84%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"distributionDetails","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA1000","maxLength":"1000"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributionCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S2025072922215%22","desc":"%20%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"64"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22O202507111%22","desc":"","maxLength":"36"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productName","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%B8%83%E6%B4%9B%E8%8A%AC%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productCode","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22PROD202507777%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E8%81%94%E5%90%88%E9%99%90%E4%BB%B7%E9%98%B3%E5%85%89%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"tradeName","required":false,"label":"%E5%95%86%E5%93%81%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8%E6%AD%A2%E7%97%9B%E8%8D%AF%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospListCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22CSBESTGAME20250729%22","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productSpec","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E8%A7%84%E6%A0%BC","exampleValue":"%2220ml%3A10mg%22","desc":"","maxLength":"1000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productMod","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E5%89%82%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%22%E6%B3%A8%E5%B0%84%E5%89%82%22","desc":"","maxLength":"1000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productPackage","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E5%8C%85%E8%A3%85","exampleValue":"%22100ml%3A10g(%E7%B2%BE%E5%88%B6%E9%B1%BC%E6%B2%B9)%3A1.2g(%E5%8D%B5%E7%A3%B7%E8%84%82)%C3%971%E7%93%B6%2F%E7%93%B6%22","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveNo","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E5%87%86%E6%96%87%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22%E5%9B%BD%E8%8D%AF%E5%87%86%E5%AD%97J20150040%22","desc":"","maxLength":"300"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"batchNumber","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E6%AC%A1%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22100-3333%22","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"pacConvRat","required":false,"label":"%E8%BD%AC%E6%8D%A2%E6%AF%94","exampleValue":"%221.0%2F1%22","desc":"","maxLength":"16"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"purchaseCount","required":false,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"200.5","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"21,6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"deliveryCount","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"12.4","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"21,6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"deliveryAmount","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"1888.5","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"21,6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliveryTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"%222024-07-10%2015%3A24%3A00%22","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%97%E4%BA%AC%E6%96%B0%E6%97%B6%E4%BB%A3%E8%8D%AF%E4%B8%9A%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"produceEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E4%B8%8A%E9%A5%B6%E6%96%B0%E6%97%B6%E4%BB%A3%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%BE%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"purchasePrice","required":false,"label":"%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%E4%BB%B7","exampleValue":"18.5","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"21,6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"highSelLmtPrice","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%80%E9%AB%98%E9%94%80%E5%94%AE%E4%BB%B7","exampleValue":"20.87","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"21,6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expiredDate","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%89%E6%95%88%E6%9C%9F%E6%88%AA%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"%222024-12-27%22","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"receiveAddress","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%B6%E8%B4%A7%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"%22%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E4%B8%8A%E9%A5%B6%E5%B8%82%E9%87%8D%E9%98%B3%E5%A4%A7%E9%81%93999%E5%8F%B7%22","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"storageRoom","required":false,"label":"%E5%BA%93%E6%88%BF","exampleValue":"%22%E4%B8%80%E5%8F%B7%E5%BA%93%E6%88%BF%22","desc":"","maxLength":"255"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactName","required":false,"label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"%22TOM%22","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selInvoiceTwo","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88%E4%BA%8C%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%22202507290000%22","desc":"","maxLength":"36"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selInvoiceDateTwo","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%8C%E7%A5%A8%E5%BC%80%E7%A5%A8%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"%222025-08-28%2019%3A00%3A00%22","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selInvoiceOne","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%80%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%2212345678901234657890%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selInvoiceDateOne","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%BC%80%E7%A5%A8%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"%222025-08-28%2019%3A00%3A00%22","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"traceCodes","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22123354645656%2C434354545657%22","desc":"%20%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E8%BF%BD%E6%BA%AF%E7%A0%81%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E6%8B%BC%E6%8E%A5","maxLength":"30000"}}],"open":false}],"open":false}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%EF%BC%9B%20%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Etrue%EF%BC%9B%0D%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Efalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"succeedSize","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"failedSize","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"result","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E3%80%81%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%9B%0A%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"errorList","label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"distributeCode","label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22S123456789%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","name":"errorMessage","exampleValue":"%22%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87200%E4%BD%8D%22"}}]}],"open":false}]}]</restparamstable>

### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "result": true,
        "succeedSize": 1,
        "failedSize": 1,
        "errorList": [
            {
                "distributeCode": "DIS-20230101-002",
                "errorMessage": "发货时间格式错误"
            }
        ]
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | E0002| 导入的配送明细不能为空| 输入需要导入的配送明细 |
 | E0002| 医院薪福通企业号不存在| 输入正确的医院薪福通企业号 |
  | E0002| 导入医院的薪福通企业号不能为空| 输入导入配送明细对应的医院薪福通企业号 |
  | E0002| 配送明细编码不能为空| 输入每条导入配送明细对应的配送明细编码 |
  | EROOR1| 系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员 |
  | EROOR2| 导入数据超过最大限制1000条|调整导入数据至1000以下 |
  | EROOR2| 暂未与该医院建立绑定关系，请联系医院绑定|联系医院建立绑定关系 |
  | EROOR2|以下配送明细编码重复：xxxx|检查导入数据，修改导入的配送明细编码|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/supplier/distribution-detail/import

接口描述

药品配送明细导入，将集采平台业务系统中的药品配送明细数据推送至医招智付（供应商端）应用。

以药品配送明细编码作为唯一键，重复导入时进行更新操作。

注意：

  1. 批量接口，允许部分成功；
  2. 单次导入上限为1000；
  3. 已从供应商端推送至医院端的数据，不支持更新。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
E0002导入的配送明细不能为空输入需要导入的配送明细
E0002医院薪福通企业号不存在输入正确的医院薪福通企业号
E0002导入医院的薪福通企业号不能为空输入导入配送明细对应的医院薪福通企业号
E0002配送明细编码不能为空输入每条导入配送明细对应的发货明细id
EROOR1系统错误稍后再试，或联系开发人员
EROOR2导入数据超过最大限制1000条调整导入数据至1000以下
EROOR2暂未与该医院建立绑定关系，请联系医院绑定联系医院建立绑定关系
EROOR2以下配送明细编码重复：xxxx检查导入数据，修改导入的配送明细编码
